checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds tools/list and tools/call to the local MCP-style runtime with a single allowlisted read-only status tool and preserves resources/list and resources/read behavior.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: tools/list returns the allowlist, specbridge.operator.status returns local operator status, unlisted tools return tool_not_allowed, missing tool names return tool_name_required, resources/write remains blocked, tests cover the paths, and documentation plus evidence artifacts were added.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: No blocked files or protected scopes were changed. The runtime remains local-only with no network transport, hosted server, GitHub mutation, external resource mutation, dependency installation, deployment, cleanup enforcement, artifact retention enforcement, or issue #194 lifecycle work.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The allowed tool reads local repository status and emits JSON only. It does not access protected files, credentials, provider accounts, billing configuration, authentication, authorization, production, databases, or CI/CD security.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files are declared in the issue-240 execution contract and scope manifest exclusive_write list.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: validate-contracts, validate-contract-scopes, test-specbridge-cli, validate-final-reports, validate-audit-packets, validate-chatgpt-audits, specbridge-smoke, git diff --check, and a bounded Claude Code audit were run or collected locally before PR publication.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub Actions passed on PR #241 head 085cb5966df674b572df6aa664eeb74af5f641ca: Foundation Validation, SpecBridge Review Gate, SpecBridge PR Review Report, and Claude Review Non Blocking.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report marks completion_status as complete, records GitHub Actions passed, PR #241 merge, issue #240 closure, no deployment, and remaining future MCP and cleanup risks.

findings.evidence: The initial long Claude Code implementation attempt timed out, but the bounded implementation was completed locally and then audited with Claude Code.
findings.recommendation: Keep future Claude Code delegations bounded and prefer small audit or implementation slices.

findings.evidence: GitHub Actions passed on PR #241 before merge.
findings.recommendation: Keep post-merge memory evidence aligned with PR and issue closure state.

unresolved_risks: Future MCP tools must receive dedicated execution contracts and tests.
Network MCP, hosted server, GitHub mutation, cleanup enforcement, and artifact retention enforcement remain blocked future work.
